name: Plants Vs Zombies: Merge Defense
description: Plants Vs Zombies Merge Defense is an army of merged plants to protect your garden from countless zombies. Your goal is to protect your garden from challenging waves of zombies. Experimenting with different plant combinations and positioning is the key to maximizing your defense capabilities and overcoming tough challenges. Prepare your defenses, merge your plants wisely, and unleash the full power of your green army to triumph over the relentless hordes of brain-craving zombies!
instructions: 1 Click the mouse or tap the screen to grow plants to prevent zombies from attacking 2 The gold coins or diamonds obtained can be used to buy different heroes and plants and upgrade them to stop the attack of zombies 3 Similar plants can be merged to
